caption: Clinically labelled SHAP feature-importance panel for SynDX dizziness-case modeling; bars annotated with mean absolute SHAP values. Per-sample SHAP arrays are not exported, so no bootstrap confidence interval is shown (see human-review note).
Focused SynDX validation metrics split from dense dashboard-style outputs.
Counterfactual quality profile (dot plot on a common 0-1 scale) summarizing sparsity, clinical plausibility, diversity, and proximity; replaces a radar chart for accurate magnitude reading.
